blocker_grouping_metadata.grouping_policy: Preserve every blocker while separating local replay, git clean-clone replay inputs, and owner Git handoff actions. This grouping does not run or imply git add, commit, push, reset, checkout, or cleanup.

dirty_tracked_required_inputs.description: Tracked required replay inputs that have uncommitted local changes.

git_clean_clone_root.description: Aggregate blocker for replay from a real git clean clone.

local_clean_checkout_detail.description: Detailed blockers from the local clean-checkout receipt.

local_clean_checkout_root.description: Aggregate blocker for local worktree-copy replay.

release_control_commit_set.description: Pending release-control commit-set size from the cleanup plan.

release_control_human_handoff.description: Owner Git review/action required before clean-clone replay can be promoted.

untracked_required_inputs.description: Required replay inputs that are not tracked in Git.

claim_boundary: This receipt aggregates clean-checkout and git-clean-clone replay evidence for the RC benchmark regeneration gate. It does not run git add, commit, push, reset, checkout, or cleanup commands; it does not prove Linux/Windows parity, close full Phase 3, or promote Developer Preview RC readiness.

git_clean_clone_gate.claim_boundary: This receipt is the authoritative Phase 3 seed git-clean-clone reproduction gate. When blocked, it proves the exact tracked/dirty-input reason a real clone cannot yet replay the seed benchmark artifacts from Git HEAD. When passing, it proves only a local git clone replay of generated analytic-small and element-patch seed artifacts. It is not Linux/Windows parity and does not prove Developer Preview Release Candidate closure, OpenSees, buildingSMART IFC, commercial-cross-solver, large-model, and is not full Phase 3 closure.

local_clean_checkout_gate.claim_boundary: This receipt proves one local isolated minimal worktree-copy replay of the generated analytic-small, element-patch, and nonlinear material-mesh Phase 3 seed benchmark commands. It is not a full git clean clone, not Linux/Windows parity, not Developer Preview Release Candidate closure, and not full Phase 3 corpus closure.

owner_action: Review the release-control cleanup plan, track or commit required inputs after human review, rerun the git clean-clone reproduction receipt, and rerun this Phase 6 clean-checkout status before promoting the RC gate.

release_control_cleanup_gate.claim_boundary: This receipt organizes local Git cleanup needed for Phase 3 seed git-clean-clone replay. Its candidate set is not an exhaustive current-worktree dirty-path inventory; the product readiness snapshot carries the current-worktree diagnostic separately. It does not commit, push, release, promote Developer Preview readiness, or close Phase 3. Dirty tracked paths require owner review before they are bundled with the release-control evidence set.

summary_line: Phase 6 clean checkout: READY | local=True | git_clone=True | cleanup_pending=0
